nodes.label: KalkMate5.png
nodes.summary: Marketing/build photo showing a green KalkMate PCB on an electronics workbench with Hakko soldering station, multimeter, oscilloscope, solder spool, tweezers, flush cutters, and SMD components (resistors/capacitors) laid out for assembly.
nodes.description: Photograph of a green square KalkMate printed circuit board (silkscreen visible, traces and mounting holes for components) placed on a dark workbench mat. Surrounding tools and equipment include: a Hakko soldering iron resting in its blue stand with brass sponge, a yellow/red Fluke-style digital multimeter with probes, a digital oscilloscope displaying a green waveform, a spool of solder wire, precision tweezers, red-handled flush diagonal cutters, and small SMD components (chip resistors/capacitors) on cut tape strips in the foreground. Background shows blue parts bins/storage drawers and additional PCBs, suggesting a hardware prototyping / electronics lab setting. Likely used on the KalkMate marketing website as a hero or about-section image illustrating the hardware development process.
